message:
✨ Auto-resolve missing channel logos from tv-logo/tv-logos (#42)

- Add LogoResolverService: fuzzy-matches channel names to tv-logo/tv-logos
  GitHub repo (784+ US logos, plus international/CA/UK)
- Matching: exact, aliases, prefix, substring with smart normalization
- Strips IPTV prefixes (US-P|, UK:) and quality tags (HD, FHD, 4K)
- Falls back to EPG channel icons when available
- Runs in background after each provider refresh
- Caches logo index 24h in SharedPreferences
- Add updateChannelLogo() to database
- Integrate into provider_manager refresh pipeline

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
